{{Quote|Let's get going, Xob! Our luck can only ''improve'' after ''this'' fiasco!|Olag Greck to Xob|<ref name="Droids4">[[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids'' (1995) 4]]</ref>}}
'''Xob''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] henchman to [[Olag Greck]]. He was sometimes seen with Greck during his reign. He was one of few Gamorreans to carry a gun, bazooka, or any modern weapon of that time on a regular basis.

[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] were his frequent adversaries.
